Welcome to MacClock!

QUICK INSTALL (recommended):
  Double-click "Install MacClock.command" in this window. It will:
    • Copy MacClock.app to /Applications
    • Remove the macOS quarantine flag so Gatekeeper allows it to launch
    • Open the app

  The first time you run the script, macOS may show a security dialog.
  Click "Open" or "Allow", then it will run successfully.


MANUAL INSTALL (alternative):
  1. Drag MacClock.app to the Applications folder (shortcut included).
  2. Open Terminal and run:
       xattr -cr /Applications/MacClock.app
  3. Double-click MacClock in /Applications to launch.

  The xattr step is needed because MacClock is ad-hoc signed (built by
  GitHub Actions, not by an Apple Developer ID). Without removing the
  quarantine attribute that browsers add to every download, macOS
  Gatekeeper refuses to launch any non-notarised app.

  This is a one-time step. Future launches just require a double-click.


Source code: https://github.com/Tapnetix/MacClock
